title: Gain Friendship From Melodies
description: A simple mod that allows you to use the instrument from Immersive Melodies to increase the friendship of your Pokemon(from the Cobblemon mod) by playing music.
body:
# Overview 
  Gain Friendship From Melodies(GFFM) is a simple mod that allows you to increase your Pokemon's(from the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod) friendship by playing music to them using the instruments from the [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies). 
# Why I need this mod?
 We all know that Pokemon like Riolu needs a high friendship value to evolve, but it's quite hard to gain enough friendship to evolve at the early game.This mod adds a simple and fun way to increase the friendship.  
# Features
* Your Pokemon gain 2 friendship every 10 seconds if you're playing music with the instrument from Immersive Melodies.  
* The Pokemon will cry when the song is about to come to an end.(They Encore you like a Whimsicott! :p )  
* Doesn't work on soundproof(ability) Pokemon like Exploud.
* Your Pokemon can be awaken by your music when it gains friendship.(edit the config to heal other status.)
* Your Pokemon can imitate your performance. Different Pokemon can use different sound. **The Pokemon should reach the minimum  friendship value before imitating you,Not all Pokemon can imitate**(100 friendship by default).
* * If a Pokemon's friendship value is below the value in the config(100 by default) and it rises before being recalled, you might need to recall it and send it out again if you want it to imitate you.
* * Pokemon that learns Grass Whistle will use the sound of the flute.
* * Pokemon that learns Belly Drum will use the sound of the drum.
* * Pokemon that learns Heal Bell will use the sound of the triangle.
* * All Kricketune can use the sound of the lute to imitate.
* * Snorlax and Rillaboom will use the sound of the tiny drum.
* * Chingling and Chimecho will use the sound of the triangle.
* * You can add the sound to more Pokemon.(you can only use the sound of the instrument currently)
* The features mentioned above is configurable.
# How to use this mod?
1. Send out your Pokemon(The Pokemon can be sent out manually or be sent out by the pasture)
2. Play the music with your favorite instrument
3. Gain the friendship value
4. Your Pokemon will cry when the music is about to end, pick another song if needed.
## How to use the config to add instrument sound to Pokemon?
Check the [github page](https://github.com/LyquidQrystal/GFFM) for more help.The modrinth page is long enough.  

# Installation
Put all of the required mods and this mod in the mods folder

# Known bug
None yet.
